meta.title: Dr. Jorge Arce — Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery · v7 Noon
meta.description: Not promises, not sales talk. Honest assessment, careful planning, and the surgery you need to move forward. South Bay, California.

sections.statement: Not promises, not sales talk. Just honest assessment, careful planning, and the surgery you need to move forward.
sections.title:
Hands-on surgery for
the complex cases

cards.d: From a single implant to a complete full-arch restoration — planned and placed with precision.
Rebuilding function and structure where bone and tissue have been lost.
The difficult surgeries other clinicians prefer to refer elsewhere.
Identifying and addressing conditions affecting teeth, gums, bone, and joints.
Clarity and direction for patients facing complex decisions — including, when right, the advice not to operate.
Long-term care that protects the work of a restored smile.

items.q: I had been told by two surgeons it was impossible. Dr. Arce took the time no one else did.

items.h: The first call for referring dentists
items.q: When a case is beyond what I can handle, Jorge is the first call I make. My patients always come back grateful — and so do I.
The most thorough and honest surgeon I have ever met. He treated my father like family.
Calm, precise, and genuinely kind. He explained every step until I understood. The result speaks for itself.

items.h: Where periodontists send the hard ones
items.q: I refer my most complex cases to Dr. Arce without hesitation. Twenty-seven years shows.
I was terrified of the procedure. He never rushed me. Best decision I have made for my health.
Reliable, communicative, and surgically excellent. He sends my patients back with a full report every time.
I only wish I had found him sooner. I recommend Dr. Arce to everyone I know.

items.l: shortcuts — only the time the case actually needs

sections.caption: Jorge Arce — Founder, D.D.S.
sections.lead: He never aimed to run the biggest practice. The choice is to stay careful and independent — so that every patient works directly with the surgeon.
paras: Jorge grew up in Colombia, the son of a family that valued precision and patience long before he ever held a scalpel. He trained there, moved to California to specialize, and never left.

This means no layers, no hand-offs, no endless back-and-forth. Just <r>twenty-seven years of surgical judgment,</r> clear communication, and real accountability — on complex extractions, reconstruction, and full-arch implant cases. In 2007 he founded the Dental Implants Center of South Bay on a single, unglamorous principle: <r>take the time the case actually needs.</r>
Outside the operating room he is a father, a mentor to younger surgeons, and a quiet student of his craft — still reading, still refining.

sections.title: Sharing the craft with the profession.
sections.text: Lectures and mentorship on implantology and complex reconstruction — training the next generation of surgeons.
